features.evidence: MacOs is butter and I think Apple deserves greater market share in the computer space I lost $1,000 that day

It stays cool no overheating issues hardly ever gets warm and the battery life is phenomenal I am so thankful they brought back the MagSafe charger, I haven’t had anyone kick the cable and disconnect it from my laptop yet, but I have several small grandchildren, and it’s nice to be prepared
value: battery and power: ['Up to 18 hours video streaming', 'Up to 15 hours wireless web', 'Built-in 53.8-watt-hour lithium-polymer battery', '30W USB-C Power Adapter (included with M4 with 8-core GPU)', '35W Dual USB-C Port Compact Power Adapter (included with M4 with 10-core GPU; configurable with M4 with 8-core GPU)', 'USB-C to MagSafe 3 Cable', 'Fast-charge capable with 70W USB-C Power Adapter']

features.evidence: I bought this MacBook to replace an aging Windows laptop I had, and I’ve been tickled to death with it—the screen is plenty large, it’s got plenty of RAM for everything I run concurrently (Internet, email, Microsoft Office, RustDesk), it only weighs a couple of pounds, and it seems like the battery just lasts for days (I typically use it for 30 minutes to 3 hours at a time) I bought the model with the 15 inch screen, 24 GB of RAM, and 500 GB SSD
value: display: ['Liquid Retina display', '15.3-inch (diagonal) LED-backlit display with IPS technology; 2880-by-1864 native resolution at 224 pixels per inch', '500 nits brightness', 'Color', 'Support for 1 billion colors', 'Wide color (P3)', 'True Tone technology']

display support: ['Simultaneously supports full native resolution on the built-in display at 1 billion colors and:', 'Up to two external displays with up to 6K resolution at 60Hz', 'Thunderbolt 4 digital video output', 'Support for native DisplayPort 1.4 output over USB-C']

features.evidence: The build quality is solid, and the design looks modern and professional The new 12MP Center Stage camera is a big upgrade for video calls, Touch ID works flawlessly, and the Midnight finish looks sleek and premium
The charging brick has two USB-C ports on it, so I can plug in a charging cable for my phone as well The laptop has two USB-C ports as well as a 1/8 inch audio jack

The performance is fast and smooth, and it handles daily tasks and multitasking without any issues Performance is incredibly fast and smooth—everything from multitasking to creative work feels effortless

I bought this MacBook to replace an aging Windows laptop I had, and I’ve been tickled to death with it—the screen is plenty large, it’s got plenty of RAM for everything I run concurrently (Internet, email, Microsoft Office, RustDesk), it only weighs a couple of pounds, and it seems like the battery just lasts for days (I typically use it for 30 minutes to 3 hours at a time) With 16GB of unified memory, the system stays responsive even with multiple apps open, and the 256GB SSD delivers quick boot times and fast file access
It stays cool no overheating issues hardly ever gets warm and the battery life is phenomenal

The screen as I mentioned in my other review on the 13inch version can be damaged by debris if you don't clean your keyboard and screen before closing because it's a tight space between the screen and the keyboard when close
value: keyboard and trackpad: ['Backlit Magic Keyboard with:', '78 (U.S.) or 79 (ISO) keys including 12 full-height function keys and 4 arrow keys in an inverted-T arrangement', 'Touch ID', 'Ambient light sensor', 'Force Touch trackpad for precise cursor control and pressure-sensing capabilities; enables Force clicks, accelerators, pressure-sensitive drawing, and Multi-Touch gestures']

features.evidence: The laptop has two USB-C ports as well as a 1/8 inch audio jack

I think the only thing I don’t love about this laptop is the trackpad: it is nice and large, and has left and right click, but I just don’t like the feel of it, though to be honest, I don’t like the feel of trackpads in general – – I miss the track stick that was on my work-issued Lenovo laptop

features.evidence: It is fast, silent due to not having a fan, and just a joy to use
